qhold-3bv7mi-mpze3h04.query: Quality containment drift surface finish required elevated nominal maintenance approval

rationale: Spindle vibration crossed the advisory band.
Cpk is below the preferred release threshold.
Surface finish drift requires verification before release.
Expanded sampling is required.

recommendation.summary: Contain the lot, expand sampling, and hold release pending reviewed evidence.
actions: Expand inspection coverage on the active lot and adjacent genealogy.
Schedule spindle inspection and verify maintenance threshold history.
Attach approved source trace to the quality-hold recommendation.
Require operator and quality review before any simulated writeback.
Escalate process parameter review to manufacturing engineering.

retrievedDocuments.title: Grinding line quality escape review
retrievedDocuments.snippet: Requires lot hold, inspection sample expansion, root-cause note, and operator signoff before any controlled release.

retrievedDocuments.title: Metrology sample expansion protocol
retrievedDocuments.snippet: When surface finish drift is confirmed, expand sampling to adjacent lots and record lot genealogy links in the evidence packet.

retrievedDocuments.snippet: Surface finish deviations require process parameter review, lab verification, and controlled release notes.

retrievedDocuments.title: Spindle vibration advisory threshold
retrievedDocuments.snippet: Trend-based inspection should be scheduled when normalized vibration crosses the advisory band for two cycles.
